title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Costco India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costco India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costco India:
Costco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
